title: Definitive Main Results Table: 8 Methods × 8 Datasets with Statistical Tests
summary: Demo notebook for the definitive main results evaluation of 8 methods (5 FIGS variants + 3 baselines) across 8 Grinsztajn datasets. Loads pre-computed evaluation output and demonstrates: (A) 8×8 main results table with mean±std, (B) Friedman test + Nemenyi post-hoc with critical difference computation, (C) Bayesian signed-rank tests, (D) Cohen's d effect sizes, (E) winner analysis, (F) method rankings. Includes heatmap visualization of performance and ranking bar chart. Uses mini_demo_data.json (65 KB) containing full metadata with 249 aggregate metrics and 1 dataset with 3 examples.
